query: SELECT projectId, entityType, COUNT(*) as count FROM idSequences GROUP BY projectId, entityType HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY projectId, entityType;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4FzqaZAU5mRtC.root --database j37MQHBuWbY6PMBApJWnKm --execute SELECT projectId, entityType, COUNT(*) as count FROM idSequences GROUP BY projectId, entityType HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY projectId, entityType;
